languages.text: "Вот уж будь уверена, капитан, я с этим не хуже тебя справлюсь".
"I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."
languages.original_text: "Вот уж будь уверена, капитан, я с этим не хуже тебя справлюсь".

traits.locale_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."
"I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."
"What am I here for, then, to turn tail at the first sign of danger? Or do you think the colonel sent me just to nag {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}"?"
"I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."
"I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

languages.text: 「では、私はここにいる目的は何でしょう。危険の兆しを見ればすぐに逃げるためですか。それとも、私はただ、あなたに文句を言うために、大佐に派遣されたのですか」
languages.original_text: "What am I here for, then, to turn tail at the first sign of danger? Or do you think the colonel sent me just to nag {mf|His|Her} {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}"?"

traits.locale_text: 「では、私はここにいる目的は何でしょう。危険の兆しを見ればすぐに逃げるためですか。それとも、私はただ、あなたに文句を言うために、大佐に派遣されたのですか」

languages.text: "Sizi temin ederim Yüzbaşım, ben de en az sizin kadar bunu yapabilirim."
languages.original_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

traits.locale_text: "Sizi temin ederim Yüzbaşım, ben de en az sizin kadar bunu yapabilirim."

languages.text: «Le aseguro, capitana, que soy capaz de ocuparme de eso tan bien como usted».
languages.original_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

traits.locale_text: «Le aseguro, capitana, que soy capaz de ocuparme de eso tan bien como usted».

languages.text: “我向您保证，上尉，这事儿我也能办得到。”
languages.original_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

traits.locale_text: “我向您保证，上尉，这事儿我也能办得到。”

languages.text: « Vous pouvez me croire, capitaine, j'en suis largement capable. »
languages.original_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

traits.locale_text: « Vous pouvez me croire, capitaine, j'en suis largement capable. »

languages.text: "Ich versichere Euch, Captain, ich bin dazu ebenso imstande."
languages.original_text: "I assure you, Captain, I'm just as capable of doing that much."

traits.locale_text: "Ich versichere Euch, Captain, ich bin dazu ebenso imstande."
